keywords.label: Keywords
keywords.text: (user-centric) privacy preservation, Digital identity, Internet Services & Applications, Trustworthy ICT, Data portability, Trustworthiness, OSHW, Open Source, Free Software, FOSS

abstract.label: Abstract
abstract.text: This proposal aims at increasing the visibility of the NGI Zero Entrust granting programme, to promote its output and its grant mechanisms. We will increase the interaction with scientific and technical output throughout the region of Central and East Europe and beyond - which due to the nature of the funding scheme (small, early stage grants for deep tech) requires continuous attention to reach the right talent.
